basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot) has released the official Study Coordinator Notification 2026 at aiimsrajkot.edu.in. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 40 years of age with a Ph.D. in Biological Sciences or Biomedical Sciences from a recognized University are eligible to apply via email on or before 04 August 2026. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 12 August 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD General: 10 years, PwBD OBC: 13 years, PwBD SC/ST: 15 years

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Biological Sciences/Biomedical Sciences from a recognized University
qualification.details: PhD in Biological Sciences/Biomedical Sciences from a recognized University

selection_process: Interview only Written test (if more than 30 eligible candidates)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Rajkot Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Study Coordinator post at AIIMS Rajkot?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Study Coordinator position at AIIMS Rajkot is 04-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Study Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Biological Sciences or Biomedical Sciences from a recognized University to be eligible for the Study Coordinator post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Study Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Study Coordinator post is 40 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Study Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Study Coordinator position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 100,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Study Coordinator vacancy at AIIMS Rajkot?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line clearly states the post applied for.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Study Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily be based on an interview. A written test may be conducted if more than 30 eligible candidates apply.

faq.question: Q8. Where is AIIMS Rajkot located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rajkot is located in Rajkot, Gujarat, with the pincode 360110.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is AIIMS/Rajkot/Recruitment/EM15/2.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the interview is 09:00 AM on 12-08-2026.
